---
title: "testfile"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Dependency Management

```{r}

renv::restore()

library(devtools)
library(shiny)
library(metacheck)
```

## Install and load Metacheck

```{r}

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("scienceverse/metacheck")

```

## Open Metacheck

```{r}

metacheck::metacheck_app()
```

## Create XML files of pdf's

```{r}

papers <- pdf2grobid(filename = "pdfs")

paper_list <- read(papers)

paper_list$info

p <- module_run(paper_list, "code_check")
p1 <- module_run(paper_list, "repo_check")

p1[["table"]]
p1[["summary_table"]]
```
